title: Cronos Cannabis Company Slashes Losses, Reports Highest Quarterly Net Revenue In Q1 2024
text: Cronos Group Inc. reported substantial improvements in Q1 2024 financial performance, demonstrating progress toward profitability. The cannabinoid company achieved record quarterly net revenue of $25.3 million, representing 30% growth compared to prior year. This expansion was driven primarily by strong sales in Canada and Israel. Cronos dramatically reduced net loss to $2.48 million from $18.04 million in Q1 2023—an 86% improvement year-over-year. The company's gross profit surged 53% to $4.48 million with gross margins expanding to 18%. Adjusted EBITDA losses decreased to $10.67 million from $15.68 million, reflecting successful cost-control efforts. CEO Mike Gorenstein stated results demonstrate global team's commitment to excellence. The company maintains strong balance sheet with $855 million in cash and equivalents, positioning it for continued market expansion. Cronos is pursuing strategic growth initiatives including introducing PEACE NATURALS brand in UK while expanding Spinach and Lord Jones in Canada.
